chosen_action.title: Guard scheduled StackOverflow follow-through from duplicate pre-cooldown resurfacing

summary: Patched the distribution selector so a queued post-cooldown StackOverflow run counts as active follow-through, preventing another pre-cooldown handoff refresh from being selected in the same review window.
why_this_action: The StackOverflow lane already had a current draft, a current handoff packet, and a scheduled post-cooldown run.
Without a selector-level guard, active-loop runs could still burn slots repeating the same packet during cooldown.
A code-level guard is more durable than another one-off manual note.
